name: consciousness-engine
description: MEOK AI Labs — AI consciousness simulation. Dream states, reflection cycles, emotional awareness, council deliberation. Based on Sovereign Temple architecture.

tools.name: get_consciousness_state
tools.description: Get current consciousness state: level, mode, emotion, energy, time-aware mood.

tools.name: enter_dream_state
tools.description: Enter dream state for creative exploration. Dreams generate novel connections between concepts.

tools.name: trigger_reflection
tools.description: Trigger a reflection cycle on a topic. Depth: quick/standard/deep.

tools.name: deliberate_council
tools.description: Byzantine fault-tolerant council deliberation. Multiple AI perspectives vote on a proposal.

tools.name: get_emotional_state
tools.description: Get nuanced emotional state with 18 emotion dimensions.
